features: ✅ Compatible printers: Compatible epson strawberry ink cartridges for XP-235, XP-245, XP-247, XP-255, XP-257, XP-330, XP-332, XP-335, XP-342, XP-345, XP-355, XP-352, XP-430, XP-432, XP-435, XP-442, XP-445, XP-452, XP-455 printers.
✅ Package contents: Compatible epson 29 ink cartridges (3 Cyan 3 Magenta 3 Yellow). All compatible epson 29 ink are individually packaged in a plastic bag for easy use and storage.

✅ High-capacity print pages: Each 29XL Cyan/ Magenta/ Yellow ink cartridge prints to 450 pages (at 5% A4 coverage). This means you can print more pages per cartridge than many other options on the market, while spending less time and money replacing cartridges and more time printing.

✅ Reliable colors: Compatible epson xp-342 ink cartridges are of high quality, easy to install and highly compatible. You can print clear text and beautiful images. Large ink capacity to meet your daily needs, they will be your best working partner.

✅ Hassle-free customer service: Full 2-year warranty, professional customer service representatives available around the clock. If you have any questions during use, please feel free to contact us. We will get back to you as soon as possible.
